intro: Abacosa micrantha, also known as Velvet Bean or Cowitch, is a tropical plant native to South America and the Caribbean, characterized by its small, red or purple flowers and pods that contain a high concentration of seeds rich in protein and other compounds. The health benefits of Abacosa micrantha include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
